/etc/systemd/system/broken.service.content:
[Unit]
Description=Broken Application Service
After=postgresql.service

[Service]
ExecStart=/usr/bin/myapp --config /etc/myapp/config.yml
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=3
User=appuser

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

/var/log/broken-journal.log.content:
Jan 15 10:05:30 polaris systemd[1]: Starting Broken Application Service...
Jan 15 10:05:30 polaris systemd[1]: broken.service: Failed to execute /usr/bin/myapp: No such file or directory
Jan 15 10:05:30 polaris systemd[1]: broken.service: Main process exited, code=exited, status=203/EXEC
Jan 15 10:05:30 polaris systemd[1]: broken.service: Failed with result 'exit-code'.
Jan 15 10:05:30 polaris systemd[1]: Failed to start Broken Application Service.
